results.text: You've gotta dance like there's nobody watching,Love like you'll never be hurt,Sing like there's nobody listening,And live like it's heaven on earth.
results.author: William W. Purkey

results.text: You've gotta dance like there's nobody watching,Love like you'll never be hurt,Sing like there's nobody listening,And live like it's heaven on earth.

results.text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
results.author: Mahatma Gandhi

results.text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.

results.text: Darkness cannot drive out darkness: only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate: only love can do that.
results.author: Martin Luther King Jr.
